title: CLAS Trust Reject Receipt
description: A signed receipt proving that a rejection decision was made.

chain_root.description: Optional receipt chain root. Genesis receipts set this to sha256:<genesis_anchor_hash>, where the anchor hash excludes the derived chain_root field to avoid circular hashing; action/example receipts may use null until full receipt storage is available.

previous_receipt_hash.description: Optional hash of the previous receipt in the chain. May be null until full receipt storage is available.

chain_index.description: Optional zero-based index in the receipt chain. Genesis receipts use 0; action/example receipts may use null until full receipt storage is available.

parent_receipt_id.description: Optional parent receipt identifier supplied by the caller when a receipt is linked to an earlier receipt. May be null until full receipt storage is available.
